description: Domain architecture comparison showing lrx-1 lacks transmembrane helix unlike its paralogs and ortholog
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1, 1, 1, 1]})
fig.suptitle('Domain Architecture Comparison: lrx-1 vs Paralogs and Ortholog', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

def draw_protein(ax, name, length, features, y=0.5):
    """Draw a protein with annotated features"""
    # Protein backbone
    ax.barh(y, length, height=0.3, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    
    colors = {
        'Signal peptide': '#FFD700',
        'Signal anchor': '#FFD700',
        'Transmembrane': '#FF4444',
        'LDL-A repeat': '#4488FF',
        'Cytoplasmic': '#88CC88',
        'Extracellular': '#CCCCFF',
        'Disordered': '#DDDDDD'
    }
    
    for feat_name, start, end in features:
        color = colors.get(feat_name, '#AAAAAA')
        ax.barh(y, end-start, left=start, height=0.3, color=color, 
                edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.8)
        if end - start > 20:
            ax.text((start+end)/2, y, feat_name, ha='center', va='center', 
                   fontsize=6, fontweight='bold')
    
    ax.set_xlim(0, max(length+10, 600))
    ax.set_ylim(0, 1)
    ax.set_ylabel(name, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', rotation=0, labelpad=60)
    ax.set_yticks([])
    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# lrx-1 (Q22179) - 368 aa
draw_protein(axes[0], 'lrx-1\n(Q22179)\n368 aa', 368, [
    ('Signal peptide', 0, 19),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 207, 246),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 246, 287),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 290, 330),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 327, 368),
])
axes[0].annotate('NO TM helix\n(SECRETED?)', xy=(368, 0.5), xytext=(420, 0.5),
                fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))

# EGG-1 (Q09967) - 551 aa
draw_protein(axes[1], 'EGG-1\n(Q09967)\n551 aa', 551, [
    ('Cytoplasmic', 0, 48),
    ('Transmembrane', 49, 69),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 122, 160),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 161, 213),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 215, 252),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 253, 288),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 291, 328),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 372, 414),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 418, 456),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 457, 494),
])
axes[1].annotate('Type II TM\n(membrane)', xy=(59, 0.35), xytext=(59, 0.1),
                fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))

# EGG-2 (Q21629) - 548 aa
draw_protein(axes[2], 'EGG-2\n(Q21629)\n548 aa', 548, [
    ('Cytoplasmic', 0, 49),
    ('Transmembrane', 50, 70),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 122, 160),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 161, 213),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 215, 252),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 253, 288),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 291, 328),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 370, 412),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 416, 454),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 455, 492),
])
axes[2].annotate('Type II TM\n(membrane)', xy=(60, 0.35), xytext=(60, 0.1),
                fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))

# CD320 (Q9NPF0) - 282 aa
draw_protein(axes[3], 'hCD320\n(Q9NPF0)\n282 aa', 282, [
    ('Signal peptide', 0, 35),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 53, 90),
    ('LDL-A repeat', 131, 168),
    ('Transmembrane', 230, 250),
    ('Cytoplasmic', 251, 282),
])
axes[3].annotate('Type I TM\n(membrane)', xy=(240, 0.35), xytext=(320, 0.3),
                fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))
axes[3].set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=10)

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFD700', edgecolor='black', label='Signal peptide/anchor'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF4444', edgecolor='black', label='Transmembrane helix'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#4488FF', edgecolor='black', label='LDL-A repeat'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#88CC88', edgecolor='black', label='Cytoplasmic'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='lightgray', edgecolor='black', label='Other regions'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=5, fontsize=9, 
          bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0.03, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: domain_architecture_comparison.png")
